narrative:
43 Ohio House district has 71,809 registered voters, with 62.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.9% D−R vs +21.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
